label: OpenAI Chat
summary: Streaming chat assistant powered by OpenAI via the Vercel AI SDK. Provides a server route that streams completions and a client chat UI that the codegen LLM is free to restyle. Use when the site needs a customer-facing assistant, a product Q&A widget, or a guided onboarding chatbot.

envVars.purpose: Server-side OpenAI API authentication. Find it at platform.openai.com/api-keys.
